currentProgram.title: MLB Baseball
currentProgram.description: The Detroit Tigers host the Texas Rangers to conclude a three-game series at Comerica Park. Josh Jung leads Texas with a .317 batting average against Detroit's Kevin McGonigle with an average of .333. Jack Leiter is the projected starter for Texas.

programs.title: NASCAR Cup Series
programs.description: The Cup Series visits the 1.5-mile Texas oval. Denny Hamlin looks to secure his third victory of the season. Following a top-5 finish at Talladega, Alex Bowman seeks to navigate the high banks of turns 1 and 2 to reach the winner's circle.
